caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied up in a bun sits in a podcast studio wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt. She is positioned behind a professional black microphone on a boom arm. Behind her is a light-colored wall with vertical yellow stripes and dark panels. One panel features the text "Employee Only" and the name "Johnson" in large red letters. On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" alongside "Boss Talk 101" and smaller text stating " Boss Talk 101 logo placeholder." Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking and gesturing with her right hand. In the initial frames, her hand is raised and open as she emphasizes a point. As the scene progresses, she lowers her hand and maintains a focused facial expression while continuing to speak into the microphone.
